action.notFoundDesc: This QR code seems invalid or the item was removed.
action.foundDesc: If you found this item, you can send a secure message to the owner.
action.messagePlaceholder: Where did you find it? How can the owner get it back?
action.successDesc: Thanks for helping out. The owner has been notified.

seo.title: Never Lose Your Gear
seo.description: Smart, trackable QR codes for your most valuable items. Protect what matters with instant Safe and Lost modes.

hero.description: Smart, trackable QR codes for your most valuable items. Protect what matters with instant Safe and Lost modes.

features.title: Why Anti-Lost?
features.description: Simple, effective, and privacy-focused protection for your belongings.

smart.title: Smart QR Codes
smart.description: Generate unique QR codes that anyone can scan to contact you.

protection.title: Instant Protection
protection.description: Switch modes instantly when you realize something is missing.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Your personal information is hidden until you choose to reveal it.

dashboard.emptyDescription: You haven't created any products yet.
dashboard.emptyCta: Create your first product to generate a QR code.
dashboard.manageDescription: Manage your product details and QR code
dashboard.basicInfoDesc: Manage the core details of your product.
dashboard.deviceStatusDesc: Control the lost/found status of your device.
dashboard.noReportsDesc: When someone scans your lost QR code, their message will appear here.
dashboard.deleteProductWarning: Once you delete a product, there is no going back. Please be certain.
dashboard.normalModeDesc: Your item is marked as safe. The public page shows standard info.
dashboard.contactEmailDesc: Visible to finders if Safe Contact is enabled.
dashboard.contactPhoneDesc: Visible to finders if Safe Contact is enabled.
dashboard.feishuWebhookDesc: Receive notifications in Feishu when the item is scanned or reported.
dashboard.lostModeDesc: Mark item as lost. This will show a warning on the public page.
dashboard.lostMessageHelp: Display a custom message on the public page, such as where to return the item.
dashboard.showContactSafeDesc: Allow finders to see contact info even when the item is not marked as lost.
dashboard.deleteConfirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the product.
dashboard.reportsDesc: Messages from people who found your item.

productDialog.title: Create Product
productDialog.description: Add a new item you want to protect.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Set your default contact information for lost items.
profile.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
profile.nameDescription: This name appears on the public item page so finders can identify the owner.
profile.webhookDescription: Receive notifications when your items are scanned or reported.

publicPage.safeSeoDescription: This item is protected by Anti-Lost. If found, please scan to contact the owner.
publicPage.lostSeoDescription: HELP! This item is LOST. Please help return it to the owner.{message}
publicPage.reportError: Failed to send report. Please try again.

qr.notReady: QR code is not ready yet

placeholder.itemDesc: A brief description of the item...

validation.productNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.productNameMax: Name must be 50 characters or fewer
validation.profileNameMax: Name must be 50 characters or fewer
validation.phoneMax: Phone number must be 20 characters or fewer
validation.finderContactRequired: Please enter your email or phone number
